definition: A predicate/policy attached to a region, evaluated at a lifecycle event of that region, whose deny-branch resolves to a member-specific outcome. The route-navigation case (Angular canActivate/canDeactivate) is one member; the concept is scale-invariant across the document, routes, modals, and elements.
usage: Standardized by the Guard protocol (Web Guards), which fixes only the seam — region + event + predicate + guard provider — and leaves each member's deny-outcome to that member. Surface vocabulary: route:guard="requireAuth" (entry guard), route:guard-leave="confirmUnsaved" (exit guard).
